The '''dark bow''' is a two-handed [[ranged weapon]] that requires level 60 in [[Ranged]] to wield. It can only be obtained as a drop from [[dark beast]]s and their superior variant, [[night beast]]s. With an [[attack speed]] of 9 (5.4 seconds), and 8 on rapid (4.8 seconds), this bow stands out as the slowest weapon in the game. It [[Multi-hit weapons|fires two arrows per attack]] which roll independent accuracy checks.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1574384707403501576|date=26 September 2022|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/bEPVF|archivedate=26 September 2022|quote=It performs two independent accuracy rolls, rather than having one shot affected by the outcome of the other.}} It has the maximum possible [[attack range]] of 10, so the [[longrange]] attack style will not increase its attack range. 

Assuming that the weapon is set to the [[rapid]] attack style, the dark bow has a firing time of '''2.4''' seconds per arrow, whereas a shortbow such as the [[magic shortbow (i)]] takes only '''1.8'''. Because of this, the dark bow is only fairly popular for [[player killing]]. It has one of the highest max hits of any weapons in the game by means of [[special attack]], along with the [[crystal halberd]] and [[dragon dagger]], although the [[twisted bow]] and [[Dharok's greataxe]] can hit harder with regular attacks, and the [[dragon 2h sword]] and [[Dinh's bulwark]] are able to deal more total damage with their special attack. 

By using a [[Dark bow imbue scroll]], the player can empower the dark bow into a [[Dark bow (bh)]], improving the item's stats and special attack. However, you can only use the [[Dark bow (bh)]] specifically in [[Daimon's Crater]].

Each arrow fired has an independent chance to to be saved by an [[Ava's device]], and the bow may also be fired with only one arrow equipped.

==Special attack==
[[File:Descent of Dragons.gif|thumb|300px|A player performing one of the dark bow's special attacks, ''Descent of Dragons''.]]
Two different attacks comprise the dark bow's unique [[special attack]], both of which consume 55% of the player's special attack energy, and require more than 1 arrow equipped.

The 1st special attack, ''Descent of Darkness'', deals up to 30% more damage with a minimum of 5 damage per arrow. The animation shows two arrows fired at the target, surrounded in a black shroud.

If the player has [[dragon arrow]]s equipped, the 2nd special attack, ''Descent of Dragons'', is used instead. This attack deals up to 50% more damage with a minimum of 8 damage per arrow, while capping the max hit at 48 damage per arrow.{{CiteNews|author=Mod Ronan|url=https://secure.runescape.com/m=news/architectural-alliance?oldschool=1|title=Architectural Alliance|newsdate=3 March 2016|quote=The Dark bow special attack has been capped at 48 damage for each arrow.}} The animation shows two [[black dragon]] heads fired at the target.

After landing a ''Descent of Dragons'' attack, an ordinary damage roll is made up to the player's maximum Ranged hit, and all rolls that exceed the damage cap are then reduced back to 48.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1587017709971202048|date=31 October 2022|archiveurl=https://archive.is/SYcXY|archivedate=21 April 2023|quote=It'd roll 0-51, then reduce 49, 50 and 51 to 48. So you have a higher chance of getting 48 than of getting 47.}} The minimum damage of 8 is still affected by damage multipliers on some monsters, for example the damage is lowered to a minimum of 2 damage per arrow on [[Ice Demon]] or a minimum (and maximum) of 0 damage per arrows on a [[Guardian (Chambers of Xeric)|Guardian]] in [[Chambers of Xeric]].

==Colouring==
Players can use [[dark bow paint]], purchased from the [[Last Man Standing]] shop for 25 points, to recolour a dark bow. This process makes the bow untradeable. To remove the colouring and make it tradeable again, players must use a [[cleaning cloth]] on the bow to return to its regular state (the paint will be lost).

==Trivia==
*Dark bows cannot be used in [[Barbarian Training|Barbarian Firemaking]]. Attempting to do so will result in a chatbox message saying, "''The innate darkness of the bow sucks all heat from your firemaking attempt. You realise that this type of bow is useless for firelighting.''".
*Dark bows have a unique [[sound effect]] when equipping them.
